commit.name: Weather Card
commit.description: Data display with props, design tokens, and responsive layout
commit.prompt:
Build a weather card component. It should display:
- Current temperature (large, prominent)
- Weather condition with an appropriate icon/emoji (sunny, cloudy, rainy, etc.)
- Humidity percentage
- Wind speed
- A 5-day forecast strip at the bottom showing day name, icon, and high/low temps

All data must come from props — never hardcode weather data. Use CSS variables from the design system for all colors and spacing.

evaluation.critique: The component has solid layout with good use of ggui primitives and comprehensive design token usage throughout. Main weaknesses: missing hover/focus states on forecast cards, no transition effects, and the forecast items could benefit from interactive polish like subtle hover backgrounds. The hardcoded fallback hex colors in var() defaults are minor concerns but acceptable as they match the token intent.
